summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be of good quality with top-tier comfort and great cushioning. They appreciate the fit, noting they work well for larger sizes. The shoes are described as very stylish and suitable for pairing with favorite pairs of jeans. Customers also value their lightweight design and versatility. However, some customers express disappointment with noise levels, while opinions on durability remain mixed among users.

authors_reviews.title: Inappropriate quality and horrible customer service
authors_reviews.text: Very uncomfortable and trashy lookingAnd still haven’t received a refund upon returning. Wouldn’t buy from them again that’s for sure.Very suspicious
authors_reviews.author: Zandy

authors_reviews.text: After decades of appreciating many different Nike running shoes for the first time IDisappointed in the material of the quality used. See photos attached

authors_reviews.title: Creating noise when walking
authors_reviews.text: Style is good but when you walk, there is a noise that is also mentioned in other comments.

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable shoes. Not durable
authors_reviews.text: Topnmesh tore in 2 weeks of normal wear
